title: Kangaroo Level 1-2 - Practice Set 18: Problem Solving
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official AKSF content.

questions.question_text: How many stars are drawn in the picture?
questions.image_description: Five identical stars in a row
questions.solution: Counting each star one by one gives 5 stars.

questions.question_text: Tom has 3 apples. His mother gives him 4 more apples. How many apples does Tom have now?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='20' cy='30' r='10'/><circle cx='50' cy='30' r='10'/><circle cx='80' cy='30' r='10'/><text x='105' y='36' font-size='18' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>+</text><circle cx='130' cy='30' r='10'/><circle cx='160' cy='30' r='10'/><circle cx='190' cy='30' r='10'/><circle cx='210' cy='30' r='8'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Three apples plus four apples
questions.solution: 3 + 4 = 7 apples.

questions.question_text: Which shape has exactly 3 sides?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='25' cy='30' r='18'/><text x='18' y='58' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>A</text><rect x='60' y='12' width='36' height='36'/><text x='73' y='58' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>B</text><polygon points='130,12 148,48 112,48'/><text x='126' y='58' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>C</text><polygon points='180,12 200,20 200,45 180,53 160,45 160,20'/><text x='178' y='58' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>D</text><polygon points='230,12 250,30 240,50 220,50 210,30'/><text x='228' y='58' font-size='10' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>E</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Five shapes: circle, square, triangle, hexagon, pentagon
questions.solution: A triangle is the shape with exactly 3 sides.

questions.question_text: Look at the pattern: circle, square, circle, square, circle, __. What comes next?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='20' cy='25' r='12'/><rect x='48' y='13' width='24' height='24'/><circle cx='100' cy='25' r='12'/><rect x='128' y='13' width='24' height='24'/><circle cx='180' cy='25' r='12'/><text x='215' y='30' font-size='20' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>?</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Alternating circle-square pattern ending with a question mark
questions.solution: The pattern alternates circle and square, so a square comes next.

questions.question_text: Which number is the greatest?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' fill='none'><rect x='10' y='10' width='30' height='30'/><text x='20' y='32' font-size='18' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>5</text><rect x='55' y='10' width='30' height='30'/><text x='65' y='32' font-size='18' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>8</text><rect x='100' y='10' width='30' height='30'/><text x='110' y='32' font-size='18' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>3</text><rect x='145' y='10' width='30' height='30'/><text x='153' y='32' font-size='18' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>10</text><rect x='190' y='10' width='30' height='30'/><text x='200' y='32' font-size='18' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>7</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Numbers 5, 8, 3, 10, 7 in boxes
questions.solution: Among 5, 8, 3, 10, and 7, the largest number is 10.

questions.question_text: What is 9 minus 4?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><text x='20' y='40' font-size='26' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>9 - 4 = ?</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: The expression nine minus four

questions.question_text: How many triangles are hidden inside the big triangle split by one line from the top vertex?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 160 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><polygon points='80,10 20,100 140,100'/><line x1='80' y1='10' x2='80' y2='100'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Large triangle divided into two smaller triangles by a vertical line
questions.solution: Two small triangles plus the one large triangle make 3 triangles.

questions.question_text: Lena has two coins: one 5-cent coin and one 2-cent coin. How many cents does she have altogether?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 160 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='40' cy='30' r='20'/><text x='32' y='36' font-size='14' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>5c</text><circle cx='110' cy='30' r='18'/><text x='103' y='36' font-size='14' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>2c</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Two coins labeled 5 cents and 2 cents
questions.solution: 5 + 2 = 7 cents.

questions.question_text: There are 12 birds on a tree. Five fly away and then 3 more land on the tree. How many birds are on the tree now?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><path d='M100 70 L100 20'/><path d='M80 40 Q100 20 120 40'/><path d='M70 55 Q100 35 130 55'/><path d='M60 15 q5 -5 10 0 q5 -5 10 0'/><path d='M140 15 q5 -5 10 0 q5 -5 10 0'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: A tree with birds flying nearby

questions.question_text: Anna is taller than Ben. Ben is taller than Carla. Who is the shortest?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 110' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><rect x='20' y='20' width='30' height='80'/><text x='20' y='112' font-size='12' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Anna</text><rect x='90' y='40' width='30' height='60'/><text x='95' y='112' font-size='12' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Ben</text><rect x='160' y='60' width='30' height='40'/><text x='157' y='112' font-size='12' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Carla</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Three bars showing relative heights of Anna, Ben, Carla
questions.solution: Anna > Ben > Carla, so Carla is the shortest.

questions.question_text: How many corners does the shape in the picture have?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 140 120' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><polygon points='70,10 110,30 110,70 70,100 30,70 30,30'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: A regular hexagon
questions.solution: A hexagon has 6 corners.

questions.question_text: The numbers follow a rule: 2, 4, 6, 8, __. What number comes next?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><text x='10' y='32' font-size='20' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>2, 4, 6, 8, ?</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Sequence of even numbers
questions.solution: Each number increases by 2, so 8 + 2 = 10.

questions.question_text: In the row of kangaroos, which position from the left is the kangaroo with the crown?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='25' cy='35' r='12'/><circle cx='75' cy='35' r='12'/><circle cx='125' cy='35' r='12'/><polyline points='115,15 120,25 125,15 130,25 135,15'/><circle cx='175' cy='35' r='12'/><circle cx='225' cy='35' r='12'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Five kangaroo heads in a row; the third has a crown
questions.solution: Counting from the left, the crowned kangaroo is the 3rd one.

questions.question_text: What number should go in the empty box so the sum is 15?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><text x='10' y='38' font-size='22' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>6 +</text><rect x='70' y='15' width='34' height='34'/><text x='115' y='38' font-size='22' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>= 15</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Equation 6 plus box equals 15

questions.question_text: A pencil costs 4 cents. How much do 3 pencils cost?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><polygon points='20,20 60,20 70,35 60,50 20,50'/><polygon points='85,20 125,20 135,35 125,50 85,50'/><polygon points='150,20 190,20 200,35 190,50 150,50'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Three pencils side by side
questions.solution: 3 x 4 = 12 cents.

questions.question_text: Five children stand in a line. Maria is not first and not last. There are two children in front of her. Which position is Maria in?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='30' cy='25' r='14'/><circle cx='80' cy='25' r='14'/><circle cx='130' cy='25' r='14'/><circle cx='180' cy='25' r='14'/><circle cx='230' cy='25' r='14'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Five circles in a row representing children
questions.solution: Two children are in front of Maria, so she is 3rd.

questions.question_text: There are 4 red balls and 6 blue balls in a bag. Sara takes out 3 blue balls. How many balls remain in the bag?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 70' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='20' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='45' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='70' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='95' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='20' cy='50' r='10'/><circle cx='45' cy='50' r='10'/><circle cx='70' cy='50' r='10'/><circle cx='95' cy='50' r='10'/><circle cx='120' cy='50' r='10'/><circle cx='145' cy='50' r='10'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Ten balls grouped in two rows
questions.solution: Total 10 balls, remove 3, leaves 10 - 3 = 7.

questions.question_text: How many small squares are in the figure below?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 130 130' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><rect x='10' y='10' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='40' y='10' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='70' y='10' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='10' y='40' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='40' y='40' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='70' y='40' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='10' y='70' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='40' y='70' width='30' height='30'/><rect x='70' y='70' width='30' height='30'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: A 3 by 3 grid of small squares
questions.solution: A 3x3 grid has 3 x 3 = 9 small squares.

questions.question_text: Peter has 20 stickers. He gives 6 to Maya and 5 to Leo. How many stickers does Peter have left?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><rect x='10' y='15' width='26' height='30'/><rect x='42' y='15' width='26' height='30'/><rect x='74' y='15' width='26' height='30'/><rect x='106' y='15' width='26' height='30'/><text x='145' y='38' font-size='20' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>...</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Several sticker rectangles indicating a collection

questions.question_text: Beads are threaded in this pattern: red, red, blue, red, red, blue, red, red, __. What color is the 9th bead?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 280 40' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='20' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='50' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='80' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='110' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='140' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='170' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='200' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='230' cy='20' r='10'/><circle cx='260' cy='20' r='10'/></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Nine beads in a line
questions.solution: The pattern repeats every 3 beads (red, red, blue). The 9th bead is the 3rd in the third repeat, which is blue.

questions.question_text: Mia is 7 years old. Her brother is 3 years older. Her sister is 2 years younger than Mia. How old is Mia's sister?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='16' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Mia = 7</text><text x='100' y='35' font-size='16' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>Brother = 7+3</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Ages labeled for Mia and her brother
questions.solution: Sister is 7 - 2 = 5 years old.

questions.question_text: A frog jumps up 3 steps then slides down 1 step each turn. After 4 such turns, how many steps up is the frog from the start?
questions.image_description: A staircase of steps going upward
questions.solution: Net gain per turn is 3 - 1 = 2 steps. After 4 turns: 4 x 2 = 8 steps.

questions.question_text: A candy costs 3 cents and a lollipop costs 5 cents. Ella buys 2 candies and 1 lollipop. How much does she pay?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 70' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><g fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><circle cx='30' cy='35' r='15'/><text x='22' y='40' font-size='12' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>3c</text><circle cx='80' cy='35' r='15'/><text x='72' y='40' font-size='12' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>3c</text><circle cx='150' cy='35' r='18'/><line x1='150' y1='53' x2='150' y2='68'/><text x='142' y='40' font-size='12' stroke='none' fill='currentColor'>5c</text></g></svg>
questions.image_description: Two candies and one lollipop with prices

questions.question_text: In the grid, how many circles are shaded with a cross inside compared to empty circles? What is the total number of circles?
questions.image_description: A grid of circles, some with crosses inside
questions.solution: Counting every circle in both rows gives 5 + 5 = 10 circles in total.
